response.global_summary: This video is a music video for the song 'Mafiosa', performed by VTuber Inugami Korone. The video is a single, continuous musical performance.

scenes.description: A full musical performance of 'Mafiosa' by Inugami Korone, featuring the 'Lazy DOOG Night!' event title in the background.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, listen up. The canine teeth that shine brightly suit you, the mouth tells a story.
Lyrical smoke fills and weaves a smoky story.
Let me see...
I wander around, wearing uncertain peace and certain anxiety.
I tremble at the fact that we are not the same.
Ten-colored values, a noisy radical. What is beginning?
My clumsy way of life makes my heart freeze (ahh).
I wonder why, a survival lacking reason.
I wish and wish, but it doesn't disappear.
I wonder why, a high-risk my life.
Do it again, do it again (escape).
Chase, chase, where is my utopia, opening the door.
Viva, if it's breaking the status quo, jump on it.
I stack my wounded heart on crumpled paper scraps.
I mark time while wrinkled (dance).
Back in the day, I ran away from many eyes.
A funky head that I keep hidden.
A gift on the extension of individuality is like a bug to someone.
I avert my eyes, with nowhere to go.
Status, emotion, cleaning, can't do it, deadlocked.
I hold, I cry, I struggle, and I fall...
Uhhh, chewing on wandering, wavering.
Hey, don't panic, go too far far far.
An animal taking one step forward (aww).
Hey, don't panic, go too far far far.
One step ahead, super ahead, super ahead (straight out).
Wip aww, wip aww, wip aww aww aww.
Critical, critical, criti criti criti.
Wip aww, wip aww, wip aww aww aww.
Don't panic, go too far far far.
Darkness takes over, like a planned harmony.
Swayed by the newly learned despair, I see it backfiring in no time.
An icon of rebellion beckons, even if I have a hint of anxiety, I encounter it.
Ignoring the peace-loving folks, I walk through the shadows, dope dope dope.
What a uhmmm...
Busy, chased by piled-up troubles.
Shooting bullets as a farewell gift to the surly insults (bang!)
Bang ba bang ba bang bang! Punching through the absurd head, pop pop.
I visit the enemy covered in pride who is desperate to hit the nail that sticks out, with something super crazy.
This energy that raises the cold body temperature with crazy emotions is literally Zion.
The trigger that bends fate ignites, here come the smoky dogs (goooo!)
As a result of forgetting that everyone is a special existence.
Denying the parts that are different from oneself, that is the defect.
Facing many contradictions and still not disappearing, foolish (battle).
Pitiful, disappearance, struggle, never never end.
Scattered hollow.
Glaring exposed fangs and speculation intertwine.
Lights out, singing with the deep night.
Hey, don't panic, go too far far far.

Work like a dog, a job I polished thoroughly.
Today, a blurry future floated in the telescope.
Someday's omerta is a souvenir too.
My whereabouts, melting the frozen heart.
Mafiosa, firing a celebratory shot (yeah).
Eine kleine Nachtmusik.
Goodbye to the sullen face.
Mafiosa, a song of blessing (yeah).
I finally found a place that can't be replaced.
Say hoo! Come on, let's dance together.
Say hoo! Let's dance together again.
Say hoo! Let's dance together forever.
I finally realized, a place that is second to none.
